title: DfE funding agreements and contracts: 2025 to 2026
body: "The contracts set out:   the obligations of the education and training provider in return for receiving public funding from the department the circumstances in which the department will take intervention action in the event of educational, financial or other failure of the provider    This page contains education and skills agreements and contracts for 2025 to 2026. For agreements and contracts to other years, see the DfE funding agreements and contracts collection page.  "
